# scm_forwarding_profile_user_location (Data Source)

ForwardingProfileUserLocation data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up the user location with IP addresses by its ID.
data "scm_forwarding_profile_user_location" "scm_forwarding_profile_user_location_1_ds" {
  id = "847948c9-8973-48aa-8496-212f572ab859"
}

# Look up the user location with internal host detection by its ID.
data "scm_forwarding_profile_user_location" "scm_forwarding_profile_user_location_2_ds" {
  id = "ee149f5a-533e-48be-8492-e3aa6b20acf2"
}

# Look up the user location with multiple IP ranges by its ID.
data "scm_forwarding_profile_user_location" "scm_forwarding_profile_user_location_4_ds" {
  id = "23293d0f-0403-4549-870f-c6c04cd6c95c"
}

# Output various attributes from the found objects to verify the lookups were successful.
output "forwarding_profile_user_location_data_source_results" {
  description = "The details of the forwarding profile user location objects read from the data sources."
  value = {
    ip_addresses_object            = data.scm_forwarding_profile_user_location.scm_forwarding_profile_user_location_1_ds
    internal_host_detection_object = data.scm_forwarding_profile_user_location.scm_forwarding_profile_user_location_2_ds
    multi_ip_range_object          = data.scm_forwarding_profile_user_location.scm_forwarding_profile_user_location_4_ds
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The UUID of the user location

### Optional

- `folder` (String) The folder in which the resource is defined
- `name` (String) alphanumeric string [ 0-9a-zA-Z._-]

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the user location
- `internal_host_detection` (Attributes) Configuration for detecting internal hosts using IP address and FQDN (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--internal_host_detection))
- `ip_addresses` (List of String) List of IP addresses that define the user location
- `tfid` (String) The Terraform ID.

<a id="nestedatt--internal_host_detection"></a>
### Nested Schema for `internal_host_detection`

Read-Only:

- `fqdn` (String) user location fqdn
- `ip_address` (String) user location ip address
